user.title: Configure Assist Router
user.description: Choose both agents, the home-automation filter, OpenClaw behavior, and View Assist visual navigation.

data.view_revert_timeout: Seconds before returning to the previous view

data_description.domotics_agent: Processes phrases containing a listed home-automation word.
data_description.keywords: Words separated by spaces, commas, or lines. Matching uses complete words and ignores case and accents.
data_description.openclaw_ack_message: Sentence Home Assistant speaks immediately without waiting for OpenClaw.
data_description.openclaw_background_instruction: Text appended to the request so OpenClaw completes it and delivers the result through WhatsApp.
data_description.view_assist_enabled: After the home-automation response, analyzes the spoken text and opens the matching View Assist category.
data_description.view_assist_entity: Automatic uses the satellite that started the conversation. Select a fixed fallback if the device ID is unavailable.
data_description.view_rules: One rule per line: category | /view-assist/path | word1, word2. Rules are evaluated top to bottom against the final response.
data_description.view_revert_timeout: Use 0 to avoid requesting an automatic return. View Assist supports up to 120 seconds.
data_description.openclaw_view_path: Path opened when a background task is delegated. Leave empty to keep the current view.

error.agents_must_differ: The two destinations must be different agents.
error.agent_not_found: The selected agent is no longer available.
error.recursive_agent: Assist Router cannot be selected as its own destination.
error.keywords_required: Enter at least one home-automation word.
error.background_instruction_required: Enter the instruction OpenClaw should follow to deliver the result.
error.invalid_view_rules: Review the categories. Each line must contain: category | /path | words.
error.invalid_view_path: The path must begin with / or be left empty.
error.not_enough_agents: At least two conversation agents must be loaded. Configure Gemini and OpenClaw, restart Home Assistant, and try again.

init.title: Assist Router options
init.description: Change the agents, words, OpenClaw behavior, and visual categories. Changes apply after saving.

data.view_revert_timeout: Seconds before returning to the previous view

data_description.domotics_agent: Destination when STT contains a listed word.
data_description.keywords: One word per line is easiest; spaces, commas, and semicolons are also accepted.
data_description.openclaw_ack_message: Immediate spoken reply that releases the voice pipeline.
data_description.openclaw_background_instruction: Instruction appended to the background request.
data_description.view_assist_enabled: The category is chosen from words found in the home-automation agent's response.
data_description.view_assist_entity: Automatic tries to find the View Assist entity linked to the microphone that heard the request.
data_description.view_rules: Format: category | /view-assist/path | word1, word2. The first matching category wins.
data_description.view_revert_timeout: Timeout passed to view_assist.navigate for returning to the previous view.
data_description.openclaw_view_path: Defaults to /view-assist/info while OpenClaw processes the task.

error.agents_must_differ: The two destinations must be different agents.
error.agent_not_found: The selected agent is no longer available.
error.recursive_agent: Assist Router cannot be selected as its own destination.
error.keywords_required: Enter at least one home-automation word.
error.background_instruction_required: Enter the instruction OpenClaw should follow to deliver the result.
error.invalid_view_rules: Review the categories. Each line must contain: category | /path | words.
error.invalid_view_path: The path must begin with / or be left empty.
error.not_enough_agents: At least two conversation agents must be loaded. Configure Gemini and OpenClaw, restart Home Assistant, and try again.
